calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Establishing Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Dec-05-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Gary Lieberman appearing for Jodell Criss as Guardian Ad Litem for Peggy Jo Spires and Garfield Bowser. John Boessenecker appearing for Gloria Bowser and Judy Bowser Jones. Gloria Bowser is in court. Issues addressed. Mr. Boessenecker said he has filed a declaration answering the issues and Mr. Millard will file a statement of interest for his fee. Special Needs Trust issue addressed by Mr. Lieberman. Court will check to see if a new number is necessary. Gloria Bowser made a statement. Matter submitted. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Ron Sinclair. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2006 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Continued To Dec-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

To Determine Inheritance Rights
Off Calendar Sep-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order

To Determine Inheritance Rights
Off Calendar Aug-16-2006 Continued To Sep-29-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

To Determine Inheritance Rights
Off Calendar Jun-28-2006 Continued To Aug-25-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Roger Meredith appearing for and with David Spires. Michael Blacksburg appearing for Timothy Spires. Counsel for the petitioners are not in court. They have informs other counsel that they are not taking any position. Mr. Blacksburg says the test result showed his client is a half brother. Mr. Meredith wants an evidentary hearing. Mr. Blacksburg will be asking for attorney's fees if Mr. Meredith can not provide the test is wrong during the evidentary hearing. Mr. Blacksburg asks the court to reconsider the court's prior ruling to have his client paid for the lab test. Court will consider that issue on the next hearing. Matter is continued to 8/25 at 9:00am for evidentary hearing. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

To Determine Inheritance Rights
Off Calendar Jun-20-2006 Continued To Jun-28-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Janet Boessenecker appearing for co-executrixs. Roger Meredith appearing for David Spires. Michael Blacksburg appearing for Timothy Spires. The lab result came back. Mr. Meredith wants a continuance to review the result. No objection to his request. Matter is continued to 6/28. Mr. Blacksburg asks the court to reconsider the court's prior ruling to have his client paid for the lab test and have the estate paid for the test. Court will consider that issue on the next hearing. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

To Determine Inheritance Rights
Off Calendar Jun-06-2006 Continued To Jun-20-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

To Determine Inheritance Rights
Off Calendar May-02-2006 Continued To Jun-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: John Boessenecker appearing for executors. Roger Meredith appearing for David Spires. Mr. Meredith has been informed that the result of the test will take 2 to 3 weeks. Matter is continued to 6/6 for status. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

To Determine Inheritance Rights
Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Continued To May-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:MICHAEL BLACKSBURG FOR TIMOTHY SPIRES; LINDSAY BURROWS FOR DAVID SPIRES. MR BLACKSBURG INFORMS THE COURT THAT DNA TESTING WOULD BE INCONCLUSIVE BEACUSE THERE IS ONLY ONE DONOR. MS. BURROWS WOULD LIKE TO GO FORWARD WITH THE DNA TESTING. THE COURT ASK MS BURROWS IF SHE WOULD ACCEPT 50% CHANCE ON TEST RESULT. MS BURROWS REPLIES THAT SHE WOULD HAVE TO SPAEK TO HER CLIENT. THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER TO MAY 26,2006 FOR STATUS ON DNA TEST. JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN CLERK:ROSIE NOGUERA

To Determine Inheritance Rights
Off Calendar Mar-13-2006 Continued To Apr-17-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

For Order Recusing Counsel

To Determine Inheritance Rights
